compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect merge-time version bumping
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section, VERSIONING.md, and any other existing docs that reference commit-time version bumping or COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md Step 3b.
**Why**: Ensures future agents have accurate awareness of the version bump process after the migration to merge-time bumping.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md (architecture section phase list, quick reference, any Step 3b references), VERSIONING.md (release workflow), any other existing docs referencing commit-time bumping
- OUT: Code changes, test changes

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md and VERSIONING.md accurately describe the merge-time version bump process
  <- Satisfies: tag-release.sh continues to work independently (docs reflect this)
- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md architecture section phase list for merge-to-main.sh is updated to include the version_bump phase
  <- Satisfies: merge-to-main.sh accepts a --bump flag (docs reflect new phase)
- When this story is complete, no existing documentation references commit-time version bumping or COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md Step 3b
  <- Satisfies: COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md Step 3b is removed entirely (docs are consistent)

Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: CLAUDE.md, VERSIONING.md, and WORKTREE-GUIDE.md updated for merge-time version bumping
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
